title: Quadlet - remove the usage of cid and podid for container and pod files
body:
#### Does this PR introduce a user-facing change?
Yes

```release-note
Quadlet - remove the usage of cid and podid, stop the container or pod by their names instead
```

comments.body:
> Should we get rid of --pod-id-file as well for pods?

This requires also changing the processing order (or adding something to preprocessing). I'll handle it in a separate PR

> Also I guess this warrants a release note, in case users depended on the id files in same way (which I wouldn't call stable a stable API so I am good to change it but we should still document such change)

I added a release notes comment. LMK if you think I should be more elaborate
@Luap99 I got around to add the removal of podid to this PR as well
